pkgmetadata.longdescription: Native PipeWire module that creates a virtual 5.1 surround sink, encodes multichannel PCM to AC3 (Dolby Digital) or DTS in real-time, and outputs IEC 61937-framed data to a hardware S/PDIF, TOSLINK, or HDMI device. Replaces the ALSA a52/dca plugin chain with a single module that talks directly to the PipeWire graph.
